query: Can you point me to studies that explore the impact of different data augmentation strategies, such as feature/token/span cutoff or dropout, in the context of contrastive learning for sentence representations?
criteria: contrastive learning sentence representation data augmentation cutoff
span cutoff contrastive learning sentence representation

title.value: Efficient Contrastive Learning via Novel Data Augmentation and Curriculum Learning

authors_year.value: Seonghyeon Ye, Jiseon Kim, Alice Oh (2021)

source_or_doi.value: DOI: 10.18653/v1/2021.emnlp-main.138; Source: Proceedings of the 2021 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing; OA: hybrid; Citations: 16

recommendation_reason.value: We introduce EfficientCL, a memory-efficient continual pretraining method that applies contrastive learning with novel data augmentation and curriculum learning.

supported_research_question.value: For data augmentation, we stack two types of operation sequentially: cutoff and PCA jittering.

method.value: For data augmentation, we stack two types of operation sequentially: cutoff and PCA jittering.

data_or_scenario.value: When fine-tuned on GLUE benchmark, our model outperforms baseline models, especially for sentence-level tasks.

main_conclusion.value: our model outperforms baseline models, especially for sentence-level tasks.

limitations.value: However, pretraining a language model from scratch with a huge corpus has high computational costs.

relevance_strength.value: For data augmentation, we stack two types of operation sequentially: cutoff and PCA jittering.

title.value: Measuring the Impact of Data Augmentation Methods for Extremely Low-Resource NMT

authors_year.value: Annie K. Lamar, Z. Ece Kaya (2023)

recommendation_reason.value: Data augmentation (DA) is a popular strategy to boost performance on neural machine translation tasks.

supported_research_question.value: Data augmentation (DA) is a popular strategy to boost performance on neural machine translation tasks.

method.value: We demonstrate the utility of this metric by training models for several linguisticallyvaried datasets using the data augmentation methods of back-translation, SwitchOut, and sentence concatenation.

data_or_scenario.value: Data augmentation (DA) is a popular strategy to boost performance on neural machine translation tasks.

main_conclusion.value: We demonstrate the utility of this metric by training models for several linguisticallyvaried datasets using the data augmentation methods of back-translation, SwitchOut, and sentence concatenation.

limitations.value: However, many NMT systems are data-inefficient and are dependent on large amounts of parallel data pairs in order to attain reliable performance, limiting their applicability in low-resource tasks.

relevance_strength.value: Data augmentation (DA) is a popular strategy to boost performance on neural machine translation tasks.

title.value: On the Impact of Data Augmentation on Downstream Performance in Natural Language Processing

authors_year.value: Itsuki Okimura, Machel Reid, Makoto Kawano, Yutaka Matsuo (2022)

recommendation_reason.value: With in the broader scope of machine learning, data augmentation is a common strategy to improve generalization and robustness of machine learning models.

supported_research_question.value: With in the broader scope of machine learning, data augmentation is a common strategy to improve generalization and robustness of machine learning models.

method.value: With in the broader scope of machine learning, data augmentation is a common strategy to improve generalization and robustness of machine learning models.

data_or_scenario.value: With in the broader scope of machine learning, data augmentation is a common strategy to improve generalization and robustness of machine learning models.

main_conclusion.value: With in the broader scope of machine learning, data augmentation is a common strategy to improve generalization and robustness of machine learning models.

limitations.value: The reason for this is that within NLP, the impact of proposed data augmentation methods on performance has not been evaluated in a unified manner, and effective data augmentation methods are unclear.

relevance_strength.value: With in the broader scope of machine learning, data augmentation is a common strategy to improve generalization and robustness of machine learning models.
